commands.review_summary:
The branch updates the conversation-label generator to pass label instructions via `systemPrompt`, omit `temperature` for Codex simple completions, log completion error stop reasons, and add mocked unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. source reproduction is high-confidence: current main sends the prompt only in user content and sends `temperature`, while the pinned Codex Responses simple transport reads `context.systemPrompt` into `instructions` and forwards defined temperatures. I did not run a live Telegram/Codex rename flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are contributor-provided real behavior proof, a changelog entry, and maintainer choice versus the broader related PR; this is not a safe automated repair lane while proof is missing.
commands.reason: author association NONE and repository permission read are not allowed
